captain_trigger: season-decided (185-pt gap, not catchable) + cannot field template Haaland so lean into variance; cum_pts-leader Salah is doubt-flagged (medical-bay 70%, managed minutes, subbed 73') so under the locked rule the shield pivots to nailed captain_shield Bowen

chip.name: TC
chip.reason: GW38 is the final gameweek so TC is use-it-or-lose-it with zero opportunity cost. APEX TC rule ideally wants a confirmed DGW; none exists, so this is a forced spot where deploying beats letting the chip expire. Independent GAFFER call diverges from sim-lab (Salah): the season cum_pts-leader Salah carries a live medical doubt flag (medical-bay 70% start, no start in ~1 month, subbed at 73' under managed minutes), capping a triple-captain's expected minutes. Bowen is 90-min nailed, on penalties, in a relegation six-pointer at maximum motivation, and is the intel captain_shield (only 10% field captaincy so a haul GAINS rank in a season already decided on points). With Haaland un-fieldable to the user (one-way template downside, no shield) and the 185-pt gap not catchable, the correct posture is variance into the highest-floor full-90 differential. TC Bowen.

reasoning: ABSENCES: Gabriel CONFIRMED BENCHED (Arteta 8 changes pre-UCL final, 0 mins), Aina CONFIRMED OUT (hamstring, ruled out of finale), Haaland CONFIRMED UNAVAILABLE (World Cup rest, dead bench slot), Gvardiol BENCHED (City 6 changes). The squad holds only 4 DEF and 2 of them (Gabriel, Aina) do not play.

DEFENCE CRISIS / FORCED BACK-THREE: a legal FPL XI needs min 3 DEF, but Munoz is the only fully fit playable defender and Gvardiol did NOT start GW38 (Guardiola farewell rotation). The submitted 3-4-3 names Gvardiol + Munoz + Gabriel; Gabriel blanks (0 pts) as he is benched, and Gvardiol is high rotation risk. This is an unfixable structural gap — no fit third defender exists and auto-subs cannot manufacture defenders that are not there. The XI is effectively forced.

CAPTAIN (independent divergence from sim-lab, rule-compliant): sim-lab and the raw cum_pts-leader signal point to Salah, but medical-bay flags Salah at 70% with managed minutes (subbed 73', no start in a month). The locked APEX rule permits fading the season-leader when doubt-flagged and says NEVER fade the intel.captain_shield unless OUT/doubt — Salah is the doubt-flagged one, Bowen is the nailed captain_shield. So captain = Bowen (90 mins, pens, relegation six-pointer), vice = Salah (keeps the high-ceiling cum_pts leader as armband cover).

TC use-it-or-lose-it: final GW, no DGW possible, chip otherwise expires worthless. TC on Bowen maximises full-90 floor x ceiling and is the only aggressive rank lever left given Haaland (EO ~99%, 35% field captaincy) is unavailable to the user.
TRANSFER none: market-desk and medical-bay agree no -4 hit is justified in the final GW to replace a bench player; expected bench return is below the 4-pt penalty. Bank 0.3m, hold.
SEASON CONTEXT: 7th, 185 pts behind, mathematically decided. intel verdict: stop mirroring template (impossible without Haaland), lean into variance via the Bowen differential captain.
risks: DEFENCE WIPEOUT: with Gabriel and Aina out and Gvardiol benched, up to two of the three DEF slots blank (0 pts) - the single biggest score risk, unfixable in GW38.
Gvardiol forced into the XI despite not starting GW38 (City rotation) - likely 0 minutes; no alternative DEF exists.
TC Bowen is high-variance: a Bowen blank wastes the chip. Mitigated by 90-92% start, penalties, and max relegation-survival motivation.
Salah (vice) at 70% with managed minutes - if a surprise non-start, vice cover degrades, but Bowen as (C) is independent of Salah.
Haaland unavailable to the user (EO ~99%, 35% field captaincy) is unfixable one-way template downside - accepted, no shield exists.
Bench is thin: Sels (GK) is the only fully reliable bench body; Kluivert is 60% to start, Aina out, Haaland dead - no live DEF cover remains.
